description: AA-07.1 attenuated distributed capability token and revocation model.

token_structure.description: Capability tokens carry explicit authority grants with monotonic attenuation.

capability_types.description: Read-only access to runtime kernel snapshots.
Request controller promotion through the pipeline.
Full administrative authority including registration and deregistration.

attenuation_model.description: Delegation must be monotonically attenuating: a child token cannot grant more authority than its parent.

rules.description: Child capabilities must be a subset of parent capabilities.
Child expiry must be <= parent expiry.
Attenuation depth must be strictly increasing (parent.depth < child.depth).
Child caveats must include all parent caveats plus optional additional restrictions.
No operation on a child token may produce authority exceeding the parent token.

caveat_types.description: Restrict token to specific seam IDs.
Token valid only within a time window.
Token can be used exactly once.

revocation_model.description: Tokens can be revoked by their issuer or any ancestor issuer.

mechanisms.description: Issuer explicitly revokes a token by ID.
Revoking a parent token cascades to all descendants.
Token automatically revoked when expiry_epoch is reached.

scenarios.description: Attacker attempts to mint a child token with greater authority than parent.
scenarios.mitigation: ATT-MONOTONIC and ATT-NO-AMPLIFICATION rules enforced at mint time.

scenarios.description: Attacker replays a previously used token.
scenarios.mitigation: Nonce field and single-use caveat prevent replay.

scenarios.description: Attacker uses a revoked token before revocation propagates.
scenarios.mitigation: Revocation is synchronous; zero grace period.

scenarios.description: Attacker creates token chain deeper than max_attenuation_depth.
scenarios.mitigation: Depth checked at mint time; tokens exceeding depth are rejected.

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate token structure and capability type definitions
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa071 cargo test --test capability_token_model_contract token -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate attenuation rules and delegation semantics
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa071 cargo test --test capability_token_model_contract attenuation -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate revocation model and cascade semantics
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa071 cargo test --test capability_token_model_contract revocation -- --nocapture
